label: Assassin tribal creatures UB - full
query: t:assassin (c:u or c:b or c:ub) legal:commander -is:commander

R001.name: Abyssal Hunter
R001.oracle_text: {B}, {T}: Tap target creature. This creature deals damage equal to its power to that creature.
R001.flavor_text: Some smiles show cheer; some merely show teeth.

R002.name: Agate-Blade Assassin
R002.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, defending player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
R002.flavor_text: Some lizardfolk wield the precious agate and yearn for fire. Others wield it and thirst for blood.

R003.name: Agent of the Fates
R003.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
Heroic — Whenever you cast a spell that targets this creature, each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice.

R004.name: Assassin Initiate
R004.oracle_text: {1}: This creature gains your choice of flying, deathtouch, or lifelink until end of turn.
R004.flavor_text:
"For a secret brotherhood, you certainly do get a lot of new recruits."
—Leonardo, to Ezio

R005.name: Aven Heartstabber
R005.oracle_text:
Flying
As long as there are five or more mana values among cards in your graveyard, this creature gets +2/+2 and has deathtouch.
When this creature dies, mill two cards, then draw a card.

R006.name: Big Game Hunter
R006.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, destroy target creature with power 4 or greater. It can't be regenerated.
Madness {B} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)

R007.name: Bile-Vial Boggart
R007.oracle_text: When this creature dies, put a -1/-1 counter on up to one target creature.
R007.flavor_text: It took years to finesse his potion of necroskitter slime and bogslither teeth. Finally, *he* would prank the fae.

R008.name: Blade of the Swarm
R008.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, choose one —
• Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature.
• Put target exiled card with warp on the bottom of its owner's library.
R008.flavor_text: The Eumidians sought the secret of weftwalking in Drix DNA. Though they failed, their attempts yielded other gains.

R009.name: Blood Operative
R009.oracle_text:
Lifelink
When this creature enters, you may exile target card from a graveyard.
Whenever you surveil, if this card is in your graveyard, you may pay 3 life. If you do, return this card to your hand.

R010.name: Briarblade Adept
R010.oracle_text:
Whenever this creature attacks, target creature an opponent controls gets -1/-1 until end of turn.
Encore {3}{B} ({3}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.)

R011.name: Brotherhood Ambushers
R011.oracle_text: Freerunning {3}{B} (You may cast this spell for its freerunning cost if you dealt combat damage to a player this turn with an Assassin or commander.)
R011.flavor_text: The ones you can see are just a distraction. There are many others, hidden in the shadows, waiting for the perfect moment to strike unseen.

R012.name: Brotherhood Patriarch
R012.oracle_text: When this creature dies, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
R012.flavor_text:
"Don't you recognize me? It's a-me, Mario!"
—Mario Auditore, to his nephew Ezio

R013.name: Brotherhood Spy

"We need to stop Starrick and return London to the people who built it in the first place."
—Jayadeep Mir

Deathtouch
This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if a creature died this turn.
R014.flavor_text: Every death was funnier than the last, until his howling laughter drowned out his victims' screams.

Flash

R016.name: Cindering Cutthroat

This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if an opponent lost life this turn.
{1}{B/R}: This creature gains menace until end of turn. (It can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)

R017.name: Cruel Sadist

{B}, {T}, Pay 1 life: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

Face of innocence. Hand of death.

{4}{B}{B}: Exile target creature and put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
